title: tragacantha infesta
intro: Tragacantha infesta, also known as the Lesser Burnet-sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Typhaceae and is commonly found in wetlands and marshy areas. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha infesta include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by combining the dried plant material with water or a solvent.
